credentials.title: OAuth2 App Credentials
credentials.description:
**Before entering credentials, register this exact redirect URI in your OAuth app:**

```
{redirect_uri}
```

**Gmail:** [Google Cloud Console](https://console.cloud.google.com/) → Credentials → OAuth 2.0 Client ID (type: **Web application**) → Authorised redirect URIs → add the URI above.

**Microsoft 365:** [Azure Portal](https://portal.azure.com/) → App registrations → Authentication → Web platform → add the URI above. Then add **Mail.Read** delegated permission and grant admin consent.

oauth_authorize.title: Authorize Email Access
oauth_authorize.description:
1. [**Click here to open the authorization page**]({auth_url})

2. Sign in and click **Allow**.

3. Your browser will redirect to your Home Assistant instance and show a success page.

4. **Come back here and click Submit** — the integration will collect the code automatically.

*(If the browser shows an error page, ensure the redirect URI `{redirect_uri}` is registered in your OAuth app.)*

data.folders: Mail Folders (comma-separated, e.g. Inbox, Sent Items)

error.missing_credentials: Client ID and Client Secret are required.
error.no_code_received: No authorization code received yet. Make sure you clicked Allow in the browser, then click Submit again.
error.oauth_provider_error: The email provider returned an error. Check your app permissions and try again.
error.oauth_error: Failed to exchange the authorization code. Check your Client ID/Secret and that the redirect URI is registered correctly.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the email provider.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid authentication. Please remove and re-add the integration.

delete_email.name: Delete Email
delete_email.description: Move an email to Trash (Gmail) or Deleted Items (Microsoft 365).

entry_id.description: Config entry ID of the email account.

message_id.name: Message ID
message_id.description: The email message ID from sensor attributes.

mark_read.name: Mark Email as Read
mark_read.description: Remove the unread flag from an email.
